commands: echo === SCHEDULER STATUS ===; docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench && bench --site karavanimports.com scheduler status' 2>&1

echo; echo === CLEAR STALE TOKEN CACHE ===; docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe; frappe.init(site=\"karavanimports.com\"); frappe.connect(); n=frappe.db.sql(\"DELETE FROM \`tabToken Cache\` WHERE connected_app=\"98770nr2mp\"\"); frappe.db.commit(); print(\"Token cache cleared\")"' 2>&1

echo; echo === OAUTH BEARER TOKENS ===; docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe,json; frappe.init(site=\"karavanimports.com\"); frappe.connect(); rows=frappe.db.sql(\"SELECT name,user,connected_app,creation,modified FROM \`tabOAuth Bearer Token\` ORDER BY creation DESC LIMIT 5\",as_dict=True); print(json.dumps(rows,default=str))"' 2>&1
echo; echo === SCHEDULER RUNNING ===; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -i scheduler || echo 'no scheduler container'
